attacking_style: Launches attacks on climbs, sometimes employing tactical deception by feigning weakness before accelerating. Shows opportunistic breakaway instincts but struggles to sustain long solo efforts to the finish.
team_tactics: Primarily functions as high-altitude domestique setting tempo in final kilometers to position team leaders (notably Roglič). Limited personal team protection, particularly vulnerable when isolated.
terrain_preference: Pure climbing suited to lightweight build; excels on sustained mountain gradients. Severely exposed on flat, windy, exposed coastal roads where low weight becomes critical liability.
vulnerability: Crosswinds are a decisive weakness—lost red jersey twice in echelon splits at high speeds. Lacks team protection when racing for personal result. Insufficient power to finish long solo breakaways.
key_patterns: Uses feigned weakness before attacking on climbs, appearing dropped then accelerating immediately (2 instances).
Inherited GC positions through opponent misfortune rather than offensive strength (2 red jersey instances via crashes).
Crosswinds consistently expose him: dropped from red jersey groups at 28kph winds, weight liability at 114lbs (3 instances).
Functions as final-kilometer positioning domestique for team leaders, setting tempo before leader attack (2 instances).
Strong breakaway initiator but caught before finish when attempting long solo efforts (2 instances).
form_trajectory: negative: abandoned Catalunya 2023 on decisive stage, suggesting declining durability. Earlier 2022 showed climbing strength but no recent competitive results.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 5
